text: Open Source Intel Reza Pahlavi: Recently I met with a group of Iranian-American engineers, investors, and experts from leading US technology companies. They are working on solutions to assist the people of Iran in their fight for liberation and preparing to help in Iran's post-Islamic Republic reconstruction. tweet

text: OSINTdefender The Israel Defense Force (IDF) has significantly increased the tempo of strikes on Lebanese Hezbollah (LH) positions and infrastructure in Southern Lebanon, amidst ongoing reciprocal strikes between LH and Israel in the past couple days. Per an IDF statement, they have struck more than 200 LH launch sites since the start of operations. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 以色列国防军（IDF）在过去几天黎巴嫩真主党（LH）与以色列之间持续的相互打击中，显著加快了对黎巴嫩南部真主党阵地和基础设施的打击节奏。根据以色列国防军的声明，自行动开始以来，他们已经打击了超过200个真主党发射点。推文

text: Open Source Intel VP JD Vance, en route to Pakistan for peace talks, issued a warning to Iran while expressing cautious optimism about negotiations: "I think it's gonna be positive. We'll see. As POTUS said: if Iranians are willing to negotiate in good faith, we're certainly willing to extend the open hand! If they try to PLAY us, they'll find the negotiating team is not that receptive." "We're gonna try to have a positive negotiation. The president has given us some pretty clear guidelines." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 副总统 JD·万斯在前往巴基斯坦进行和平谈判的途中，在对谈判表示谨慎乐观的同时向伊朗发出警告：“我认为这会是积极的。我们走着瞧。正如总统所说：如果伊朗人愿意真诚地进行谈判，我们当然愿意伸出友谊之手！如果他们试图耍我们，他们会发现谈判团队并不那么好说话。” “我们将努力进行积极的谈判。总统已经给了我们一些非常明确的指导方针。” 推文

text: U.S. Central Command A U.S. Marine Corps F-35B Lightning II takes off from USS Tripoli (LHA 7). The F-35B can take off from shorter runways and land vertically, allowing it to operate from Tripoli’s flight deck, which is less than 850 feet in length. Tripoli is currently sailing in the U.S. Central Command area of responsibility. tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部 一架美国海军陆战队 F-35B“闪电II”战斗机从“的黎波里”号两栖攻击舰（LHA 7）上起飞。F-35B 可以在较短的跑道上起飞并垂直降落，使其能够从长度不足 850 英尺的“的黎波里”号飞行甲板上操作。“的黎波里”号目前正在美国中央司令部责任区航行。推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 U.S. Vice President Vance told the press that he is hopeful that negotiations in Islamabad will be a success, that if Iran is willing to negotiate in good faith the U.S. will extend an open hand. "We're looking forward to the negotiation. I think it's going to be positive. We'll of course see. As the president of the United States said, if the Iranians are willing to negotiate in good faith, we're certainly willing to extend an open hand. If they're going to try to play us, then they're going to find that the negotiating team is not that receptive. So we're trying to have a positive negotiation. The president has given us some pretty clear guidelines, and we're going to see.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 美国副总统万斯告诉媒体，他希望伊斯兰堡的谈判能够取得成功，如果伊朗愿意真诚地进行谈判，美国将伸出友谊之手。“我们期待着谈判。我认为这会是积极的。我们当然会拭目以待。正如美国总统所说，如果伊朗人愿意真诚地进行谈判，我们当然愿意伸出友谊之手。如果他们试图耍我们，他们会发现谈判团队并不那么好说话。所以我们正在努力进行积极的谈判。总统已经给了我们一些非常明确的指导方针，我们将拭目以待。” @wfwitness

text: 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 All logistical and security preparations in Islamabad are complete, though the start of negotiations has been officially rescheduled for tomorrow morning . U.S. advance teams are already on the ground, the Iranian representatives and Vice President J.D. Vance have yet to land , with the American delegation currently en route from Washington. The world’s attention remains fixed on the Pakistani capital as it prepares to host these pivotal talks aimed at redefining regional security .
text_zh: 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 伊斯兰堡的所有后勤和安全准备工作已经完成，尽管谈判的开始时间已正式重新安排到明天早上。美国先遣队已经抵达现场，伊朗代表和副总统 J.D. 万斯尚未降落，美国代表团目前正在从华盛顿赶来的途中。全世界的目光仍然聚焦在巴基斯坦首都，因为它正准备主办这些旨在重新定义地区安全的关键谈判。

text: 🌟 Hezbollah chief praises bravery, steadfastness of resistance fighters in letter to nation — Naim Qassem: Blood of our martyrs contributed to victory against brutal, tyrannical US-Israeli enemy — Naim Qassem: Enemy surprised by resistance tactics, defensive capabilities, legendary courage — Hezbollah chief Sheikh Qassem lauds resilience, high morale of Lebanese nation in confronting enemies — Naim Qassem: Resistance will continue till last breath, it won't accept return to previous situation — Naim Qassem: Resistance will continue to protect nation, restore its sovereignty, expel occupiers — Naim Qassem: Israeli enemy failed on battlefield in confronting brave resistance fighters
text_zh: 🌟 真主党领导人在致全国的信中赞扬了抵抗战士的勇敢和坚定——纳伊姆·卡西姆（Naim Qassem）：我们烈士的鲜血为战胜残酷、暴虐的美国-以色列敌人做出了贡献——纳伊姆·卡西姆：敌人对抵抗战术、防御能力和传奇般的勇气感到惊讶——真主党领导人谢赫·卡西姆赞扬了黎巴嫩民族在对抗敌人时的韧性和高昂士气——纳伊姆·卡西姆：抵抗将持续到最后一口气，它不会接受回到以前的局面——纳伊姆·卡西姆：抵抗将继续保护国家，恢复其主权，驱逐占领者——纳伊姆·卡西姆：以色列敌人在战场上对抗勇敢的抵抗战士时失败了

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 The U.S. Department of War has released a new infographic listing the achievements of Operation Epic Fury by the numbers. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国战争部发布了一份新的信息图，列出了“史诗之怒行动”（Operation Epic Fury）的各项成果数据。@wfwitness

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Israel bombs ambulance in South Lebanon, all medics killed.
text_zh: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 以色列轰炸黎巴嫩南部的一辆救护车，所有医务人员丧生。

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 An Israeli airstrike has targeted the southern Lebanese town of Kfar Rumman. Footage: PressTV
text_zh: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 以色列空袭了黎巴嫩南部城镇卡法尔鲁曼（Kfar Rumman）。视频：PressTV

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 JD Vance takes off for Iran peace talks in Pakistan: “If the Iranians are willing to negotiate in good faith, we're wiling to extend an open hand If they’re going to try to play us, they’re going to find the negotiating team is not receptive”
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 JD·万斯启程前往巴基斯坦进行伊朗和平谈判：“如果伊朗人愿意真诚地进行谈判，我们愿意伸出友谊之手。如果他们试图耍我们，他们会发现谈判团队并不好说话”

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Two commentators on Israeli Channel 13, Raviv Drucker and Alon Ben David, suggested that Israel may be pushing Lebanon toward internal conflict in an effort to pressure the Lebanese state into confronting Hezbollah, arguing such a scenario could align with Israeli strategic interests. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列第13频道的两位评论员拉维夫·德鲁克（Raviv Drucker）和阿隆·本·大卫（Alon Ben David）暗示，以色列可能正在推动黎巴嫩走向内部冲突，以试图向黎巴嫩国家施压，迫使其对抗真主党，并称这种情景可能符合以色列的战略利益。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 IDF announced that troops of the 401st Brigade destroyed a loaded launcher aimed at Israel and uncovered an underground shaft in southern Lebanon. Additional weapons were located and destroyed, including anti-tank missiles, firearms, and magazines. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列国防军宣布，第401旅的部队摧毁了一个瞄准以色列的已装填发射器，并在黎巴嫩南部发现了一个地下竖井。此外还定位并摧毁了其他武器，包括反坦克导弹、枪支和弹匣。@wfwitness

text: JD Vance departs for peace talks with Iran in Pakistan: We’re looking forward to the negotiation. I think it’s going to be positive. If the Iranians are willing to negotiate in good faith and extend an open hand, that’s one thing. If they’re going to try to play us, they’re going to find that the negotiating team is not that receptive. The President has given us some pretty clear guidelines, and we’ll see how it goes.
text_zh: JD·万斯启程前往巴基斯坦与伊朗进行和平谈判：我们期待着谈判。我认为这会是积极的。如果伊朗人愿意真诚地进行谈判并伸出友谊之手，那是一回事。如果他们试图耍我们，他们会发现谈判团队并不那么好说话。总统已经给了我们一些非常明确的指导方针，我们将看看进展如何。

text: 🇷🇺 🛸 💥 🇺🇦 Night hunting with FPV drones. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🛸 💥 🇺🇦 使用 FPV 无人机进行夜间狩猎。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Iran Maintains Tight Control Over Hormuz: Traffic stuck below 10 vessels in 24 hours despite fragile ceasefire
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 伊朗保持对霍尔木兹海峡的严密控制：尽管停火协议脆弱，但24小时内交通量仍停留在10艘船只以下

text: 📸 IRGC Navy's destroyed Shahid Mahdavi floating base ship following U.S. airstrikes.
text_zh: 📸 美国空袭后，伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军被摧毁的“沙希德·马赫达维”号浮动基地船。
